$comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the bridge's identity constants that are not derivable from another artifact. extensionManifestKey is the extension's pinned public key: extension/wxt.config.ts injects it into the generated manifest, and the extension ID is DERIVED from it (Chrome's id derivation) by scripts/gen-ops.ts and scripts/check-extension-id.ts, which verify every copy (installers, generated TS). The native-messaging host id IS declared here: scripts/gen-ops.ts emits it into packages/shared/src/identity.gen.ts (which the extension imports for connectNative), and scripts/check-extension-id.ts verifies the Rust host and the installers against it. Chrome allows only [a-z0-9._] in host ids.
